wikitext:
[]: The One, True meaning of Eva             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Feb 23, 2005 9:18 pm http://archive.evasource.net/a-trueeva.shtml

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Wed Feb 23, 2005 9:22 pm No way. Anno didn't write that, did he?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Feb 23, 2005 9:24 pm [sarcastic font] Some how I always knew this was the real truth . . . . [sarcastic font]

[]:             Quote Post by anatrok » Wed Feb 23, 2005 9:31 pm You know, I would say that is what Eva's is all about, although Anno (I hope) didn't write that, the dude who did has got it right. I mean, I don't see how this is better then any other "What's Eva all about" theory's.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Feb 23, 2005 9:36 pm For the love of misatos boobs people its a fake anyone can see that. Why else would it be in this section? If it was true the monkey would have shut this place down long ago.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Thu Feb 24, 2005 7:29 am What kind of crap is that?? Definitely a fake....

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Thu Feb 24, 2005 11:36 am GENIOUS

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Feb 24, 2005 11:46 am For some stupid reason, I can appreciate this, and I'll explain why when a certain comic gets illustrated and put online.

[]:             Quote Post by bp32 » Thu Feb 24, 2005 1:26 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: For some stupid reason, I can appreciate this, and I'll explain why when a certain comic gets illustrated and put online.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Thu Feb 24, 2005 3:29 pm I can't remember Shinji ever trying to have wet dreams... I mean, what would that look like? :evil: grrr! :evil: grrr! :pant: :evil: GRRRRRRR, zzzzzz... :(

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Thu Feb 24, 2005 4:42 pm Ha! That'd be funny to see Shinji fall asleep trying to whack off.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Feb 24, 2005 5:06 pm Once Asuka started living thier he was probly scared to death to fwap off on frear of german reprisal!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Feb 24, 2005 5:34 pm DatDude wrote: Once Asuka started living thier he was probly scared to death to fwap off on frear of german reprisal!

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Thu Feb 24, 2005 5:37 pm :P that funny :P

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Feb 24, 2005 6:42 pm Well, even if Asuka can't whack off to anything but thin air, she could still wank...

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Thu Feb 24, 2005 7:18 pm That was so wrong on so many levels, but damn funny.
